<InfoPanel type="tip" title="Gate rules — each gate must be PASSED before promoting to the next environment">
  Waived checks require Risk Owner sign-off and must be logged in the exceptions register.
  All FAIL items are blockers — no promotion until resolved or formally waived.
</InfoPanel>

        { check: 'Dependency vulnerabilities checked (pip audit)', status: 'pass', evidence: 'pip-audit: 0 known vulnerabilities in updated packages' },

        { check: 'E2E pipeline test: 5 sample MDX files generate correct Slidev output', status: 'pass', evidence: 'Slide count and layout match baseline. Output diffs reviewed by Varun.' },
        { check: 'Performance test: p99 latency < 5s on reference doc (200KB)', status: 'pass', evidence: 'p99 = 3.8s. k6 report in CI #4421' },

      id: 'staging',
      label: 'Staging Deployment',

        { check: 'Smoke test: POST /generate completes successfully on sample doc', status: 'pass', evidence: 'Response 200, slide_count: 12, slides_url returned' },
